templates.title: Company Culture Showcase
templates.description: Dynamic video template showcasing company culture with authentic team interactions and workplace environment

prompt.main: Professional corporate culture video featuring diverse team members collaborating in modern office spaces. Camera smoothly glides through open workspaces capturing genuine interactions, team meetings, and creative collaborations. Focus on authentic moments of teamwork, innovation, and company values in action. Include shots of employees engaged in brainstorming sessions, casual conversations, and focused work. Showcase company perks, recreational areas, and unique cultural elements that define the workplace atmosphere.

elements.cameraMovement: Steadicam movement flowing through office spaces, tracking shots following team interactions, subtle handheld for authenticity during meetings
elements.subject: Diverse team members in natural work situations, collaborative groups, individual contributors, leadership figures
elements.scene: Modern open office environment, meeting rooms with glass walls, collaborative spaces, break areas, innovation labs
elements.motion: Natural employee movements, active collaboration, walking conversations, typing, whiteboard sessions, high-fives and celebrations
elements.lighting: Bright natural office lighting with large windows, warm LED panels, practical desk lamps, dynamic shadows showing time progression
elements.atmosphere: Energetic, collaborative, innovative, inclusive, professional yet relaxed, authentic workplace vibe
elements.style: Documentary-style corporate video with cinematic polish, shallow depth of field for intimacy, brand color grading

modifiedElements.scene: Split-screen video calls, home offices, virtual collaboration tools
modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Static shots with digital transitions between remote workers

modifiedElements.motion: Quick cuts, time-lapse sequences, dynamic team activities

bestPractices: Capture authentic, unscripted moments for genuine feel
Include diverse representation of team members
Balance wide establishing shots with intimate close-ups
Incorporate company branding subtly throughout
Show both work and play aspects of culture

examples.sampleOutput: 60-second culture video showcasing daily life at the company with authentic team interactions

templates.title: Product Launch Presentation
templates.description: High-impact video template for introducing new products with dramatic reveals and feature showcases

prompt.main: Cinematic product launch video with dramatic build-up and reveal. Start with teasing glimpses and abstract close-ups building anticipation. Culminate in a spectacular 360-degree product reveal with dynamic lighting. Showcase key features through elegant motion graphics and real-world application scenarios. Include sleek UI demonstrations, technical specifications overlays, and benefit-focused messaging. End with strong call-to-action and brand reinforcement.

elements.cameraMovement: Slow dolly in for anticipation, explosive 360-degree orbit on reveal, macro lens details, crane shots for scale
elements.subject: Hero product in pristine condition, multiple angles and configurations, contextual usage scenarios
elements.scene: Minimalist studio setup with infinity curve, gradient backgrounds matching brand colors, real-world application environments
elements.motion: Product emerging from shadows, rotating platforms, feature animations, particle effects, kinetic typography
elements.lighting: Dramatic spotlighting, color-changing LED accents, rim lighting for depth, reflective surfaces highlighting premium quality
elements.atmosphere: Exciting, innovative, premium, game-changing, sophisticated, future-forward
elements.style: Apple-inspired minimalism meets high-energy tech launch, clean compositions, premium commercial production

modifiedElements.subject: UI/UX demonstrations, screen recordings, feature workflows
modifiedElements.scene: Digital environments, device mockups, abstract data visualizations

bestPractices: Build anticipation through pacing and music
Highlight unique selling propositions clearly
Use motion graphics for technical specifications
Ensure brand consistency throughout
Create modular segments for different platforms

examples.sampleOutput: Premium product launch video with dramatic reveal and feature showcase

templates.title: CEO Message with Authority
templates.description: Executive communication template conveying leadership vision and company direction with gravitas

prompt.main: Authoritative CEO message video combining direct-to-camera address with supporting visuals. CEO positioned in premium office setting or strategic location. Intercut with company achievements, team footage, and vision graphics. Professional teleprompter delivery with natural gestures and confident body language. B-roll includes company milestones, employee success stories, and future vision illustrations. Subtle lower thirds for key points and statistics.

elements.cameraMovement: Stable medium shot for main address, slow push-ins for emphasis, cutaway pans to supporting visuals
elements.subject: CEO in professional attire, confident posture, direct eye contact, natural hand gestures, authentic expressions
elements.scene: Executive office with branded elements, floor-to-ceiling windows with city view, or meaningful company location
elements.motion: Measured gestures, purposeful movement between positions, smooth transitions to B-roll footage
elements.lighting: Professional three-point lighting, soft key light for flattering look, subtle rim light for depth, branded color accents
elements.atmosphere: Authoritative, inspiring, trustworthy, forward-thinking, confident, approachable leadership
elements.style: Broadcast-quality corporate communication, Netflix documentary aesthetic, premium color grading

modifiedElements.scene: Among employees or at company event location

bestPractices: Ensure authentic delivery over perfection
Use teleprompter for consistency but maintain natural delivery
Include specific examples and stories
Balance authority with approachability
Keep language clear and jargon-free

examples.sampleOutput: Professional CEO address with supporting visuals conveying company vision and leadership

templates.title: Office Environment Tour
templates.description: Immersive walkthrough showcasing modern workspace design and company facilities

prompt.main: Cinematic office tour showcasing architectural design, workspace innovation, and employee amenities. Begin with dramatic exterior establishing shot, transition through main entrance with brand reveals. Glide through different work zones: open collaboration areas, quiet focus pods, creative spaces, meeting rooms with latest technology. Highlight unique features like wellness rooms, cafeterias, recreational areas, and sustainable design elements. Include employees naturally using spaces to show scale and functionality.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth gimbal walkthrough, drone flyovers for scale, slider shots for architectural details, 360-degree room reveals
elements.subject: Architectural features, workspace designs, technology integrations, employees in natural work scenarios
elements.scene: Modern office building exterior and interior, various functional spaces, amenity areas, outdoor terraces
elements.motion: Continuous forward movement, seamless transitions between spaces, time-lapse of busy areas, parallax architectural shots
elements.lighting: Natural daylight through large windows, architectural LED features, warm workspace lighting, dramatic exterior golden hour
elements.atmosphere: Impressive, innovative, welcoming, productive, sustainable, employee-centric
elements.style: Architectural videography meets corporate showcase, real estate tour quality, magazine-worthy compositions

modifiedElements.subject: Green features, LEED certifications, energy efficiency

bestPractices: Plan route for logical flow and smooth transitions
Capture during optimal lighting conditions
Include human element for scale and warmth
Highlight unique and differentiating features
Ensure consistent color grading throughout

examples.sampleOutput: Comprehensive office tour showcasing workspace innovation and company facilities

templates.title: Business Process Visualization
templates.description: Clear visual explanation of complex business processes and workflows

prompt.main: Dynamic visualization of business processes using combination of real footage and motion graphics. Start with problem statement, then reveal solution through step-by-step process flow. Use creative transitions between stages: documents transforming into data, people connecting across departments, systems integrating seamlessly. Incorporate animated flowcharts, dashboard displays, and real employee interactions. Show measurable outcomes and efficiency gains through kinetic typography and infographics.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth transitions between live action and graphics, parallax movements through data visualizations, tracking shots following process flow
elements.subject: Process stakeholders, digital interfaces, documents, data flows, integration points, outcome metrics
elements.scene: Blend of real office environments and abstract digital spaces, split screens showing parallel processes
elements.motion: Animated arrows and connections, data flowing between systems, transforming elements, progress indicators
elements.lighting: Clean, bright lighting for clarity, color-coded elements for different process stages, glowing effects for digital elements
elements.atmosphere: Clear, efficient, innovative, problem-solving, systematic, results-driven
elements.style: Infographic video style with live-action integration, clean minimalist design, corporate color scheme

modifiedElements.subject: Software systems, API connections, data architecture
modifiedElements.style: More technical diagrams, code snippets, system architectures

modifiedElements.subject: Customer touchpoints, experience mapping, satisfaction metrics

bestPractices: Keep each step clear and concise
Use consistent visual language throughout
Highlight pain points and solutions clearly
Include real-world context not just abstract graphics
End with measurable benefits and outcomes

examples.sampleOutput: Clear visualization of complex business process with real-world application

templates.title: Team Collaboration Sequence
templates.description: Dynamic showcase of cross-functional teams working together on projects

prompt.main: Energetic collaboration video showing cross-functional teams in action. Open with challenge presentation, then show diverse team members contributing their expertise. Capture whiteboard sessions, design sprints, code reviews, and strategy discussions. Use split screens to show simultaneous workstreams converging. Include digital collaboration tools, video conferences with global teams, and breakthrough moments. Climax with successful project delivery and team celebration.

elements.cameraMovement: Dynamic handheld for energy, whip pans between team members, overhead shots of collaboration, time-lapse sequences
elements.subject: Diverse team members from different departments, collaboration tools, project deliverables, celebration moments
elements.scene: War rooms, design studios, engineering labs, conference rooms, digital workspaces, success celebration spaces
elements.motion: Fast-paced editing, multiple activities in parallel, building momentum towards deadline, high-fives and celebrations
elements.lighting: Bright collaborative spaces, computer screen glow, dramatic meeting room lighting, celebration spotlights
elements.atmosphere: High-energy, collaborative, innovative, deadline-driven, triumphant, unified team spirit
elements.style: Documentary-style with fast-paced editing, startup energy, authentic moments over perfection

modifiedElements.scene: Video calls, screen shares, digital whiteboards, home offices
modifiedElements.motion: Screen recordings, cursor movements, notification pops
Stop-motion of prototype evolution, rapid ideation

bestPractices: Show diversity in teams and perspectives
Capture authentic collaboration moments
Build narrative arc from challenge to solution
Include both digital and physical collaboration
Highlight the human element of teamwork

examples.sampleOutput: Fast-paced collaboration video showing teams working together to deliver results

templates.title: Corporate Event Highlights
templates.description: Premium event coverage showcasing conferences, galas, and company celebrations

prompt.main: Cinematic event highlights capturing the energy and significance of corporate gatherings. Open with elegant establishing shots of venue and arrival. Showcase keynote moments, audience engagement, networking interactions, and award presentations. Blend wide crowd shots with intimate conversations, speaker close-ups with audience reactions. Include behind-scenes preparation, technology showcases, and celebration moments. End with powerful message reinforcement and community feeling.

elements.cameraMovement: Crane shots over crowds, steadicam through networking areas, static tripod for speeches, roaming handheld for energy
elements.subject: Speakers, attendees, venue details, branding elements, award recipients, networking moments, celebrations
elements.scene: Premium event venues, conference stages, exhibition areas, gala dinners, outdoor corporate gatherings
elements.motion: Crowd movement, speaker gestures, applause moments, networking flow, award presentations, confetti celebrations
elements.lighting: Professional stage lighting, ambient venue lighting, spotlight moments, golden hour outdoor shots, celebration effects
elements.atmosphere: Prestigious, energetic, inspiring, connected, celebratory, professional excellence
elements.style: High-end event videography, documentary moments, broadcast quality, premium color grading

modifiedElements.scene: Broadcast studios, home setups, virtual platforms
modifiedElements.subject: Screen interfaces, remote speakers, chat interactions

modifiedElements.motion: Red carpet arrivals, trophy presentations, standing ovations

bestPractices: Capture both planned and candid moments
Ensure audio quality for speaker segments
Balance wide shots with intimate details
Include diverse attendee perspectives
Create emotional arc throughout the video

examples.sampleOutput: Premium highlight reel of corporate event showcasing key moments and atmosphere

templates.title: Training and Onboarding Video
templates.description: Engaging educational content for employee training and new hire orientation

prompt.main: Welcoming onboarding video combining warmth with information. Start with CEO welcome and company mission. Tour through essential departments with friendly team introductions. Demonstrate key systems and processes through screen recordings and animations. Include culture moments, success stories from recent hires, and mentorship programs. Use graphics for policies and procedures. End with inspiring message about growth opportunities and belonging.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth transitions between speakers, gentle push-ins for emphasis, screen capture movements, animated transitions
elements.subject: HR representatives, department heads, successful employees, mentors, new hire perspectives, system interfaces
elements.scene: Welcoming reception areas, department tours, training rooms, cafeterias, collaborative spaces, success story locations
elements.motion: Friendly gestures, system demonstrations, animated process flows, checkmark animations, progress indicators
elements.lighting: Bright, welcoming lighting, soft key lights for interviews, clear screen visibility, warm color temperature
elements.atmosphere: Welcoming, informative, supportive, encouraging, professional yet friendly, inclusive
elements.style: Educational video with high production value, mix of talking heads and B-roll, clear graphics

modifiedElements.subject: Software interfaces, technical procedures, system architectures
modifiedElements.style: More screen recordings, technical diagrams, step-by-step tutorials

modifiedElements.motion: Scenario reenactments, decision trees, quiz interactions

bestPractices: Keep segments digestible and well-paced
Include interactive elements or checkpoints
Use real employees for authenticity
Ensure accessibility with captions and clear audio
Create modular content for easy updates

examples.sampleOutput: Comprehensive onboarding video series welcoming new employees and providing essential training

templates.title: Annual Report Visualization
templates.description: Dynamic presentation of company performance, achievements, and future outlook

prompt.main: Sophisticated annual report video transforming data into compelling visual stories. Open with year overview montage, then dive into key metrics with animated infographics. Show real impact through customer testimonials and project showcases. Visualize financial performance with elegant motion graphics. Include employee growth stories, sustainability achievements, and innovation highlights. Conclude with future vision and strategic initiatives using inspiring imagery.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth movements through data visualizations, aerial shots of facilities, testimonial frame compositions
elements.subject: Data visualizations, achievement highlights, employee stories, customer impacts, leadership messages, facility growth
elements.scene: Blend of corporate locations, customer sites, community impact areas, abstract data environments
elements.motion: Growing bar charts, flowing line graphs, transforming pie charts, milestone animations, counter numbers
elements.lighting: Clean, bright corporate lighting, dramatic lighting for achievements, warm lighting for human stories
elements.atmosphere: Achievement-focused, forward-looking, trustworthy, transparent, proud, optimistic
elements.style: Premium motion graphics with live-action integration, annual report aesthetic, sophisticated data visualization

modifiedElements.subject: Environmental metrics, green initiatives, social impact
Financial performance, market position, growth strategies
modifiedElements.style: More data-heavy, technical specifications, ROI focus

bestPractices: Balance data with human stories
Ensure data accuracy and clarity
Use consistent visual language for metrics
Include diverse stakeholder perspectives
Create clear narrative through the numbers

examples.sampleOutput: Engaging annual report video combining data visualization with real-world impact stories

templates.title: Innovation Lab Showcase
templates.description: Cutting-edge presentation of R&D facilities, future technologies, and innovation culture

prompt.main: Futuristic innovation lab video showcasing cutting-edge research and development. Begin with dramatic lab reveal, then explore advanced equipment and prototypes in action. Feature scientists and engineers explaining breakthrough technologies. Use macro shots of precision work, time-lapses of experiments, and 3D visualizations of concepts. Include AR/VR demonstrations, AI applications, and sustainable innovations. Build excitement about future possibilities while maintaining scientific credibility.

elements.cameraMovement: Probe lens exploration of tech details, gimbal movements through lab spaces, orbit shots around prototypes
elements.subject: Advanced equipment, prototypes, researchers in action, experimental setups, breakthrough demonstrations
elements.scene: State-of-the-art laboratories, clean rooms, testing facilities, prototype workshops, future tech demonstrations
elements.motion: Robotic movements, 3D printing processes, chemical reactions, data flowing across screens, prototype testing
elements.lighting: High-tech blue and white lighting, laser effects, LED displays, UV lighting for special materials, holographic projections
elements.atmosphere: Cutting-edge, scientific, innovative, future-focused, exciting possibilities, professional research
elements.style: Science documentary meets tech showcase, clean modern aesthetic, subtle sci-fi influences

modifiedElements.subject: Code development, AI models, digital interfaces, cloud architecture
modifiedElements.scene: Digital environments, server rooms, developer workstations

modifiedElements.subject: Green technologies, renewable energy, circular economy solutions

bestPractices: Balance technical accuracy with accessibility
Show both process and results
Include human element behind innovation
Protect proprietary information while showcasing capabilities
Create sense of possibility and excitement

examples.sampleOutput: High-tech showcase of innovation lab featuring cutting-edge research and future technologies
